item.title: New Role as Associate Editor for IEEE RA-L and ICRA 2026！
item.description: I am thrilled to share that I have been elected as an Associate Editor for IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) and the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026. I am deeply honored by this opportunity and look forward to contributing to the advancement of the robotics community through these prestigious platforms. My goal is to foster high-quality research, support innovative ideas, and help strengthen the global robotics network.
